system.description: You can generate an utterly convincing visual illusion or make yourself practically invisible.

upgrades.name: Invisibility Field
upgrades.description: You may make one other human-sized creature invisible.

upgrades.name: Enhanced Invisibility
upgrades.description: In addition to sight, your sound, smell, psychic aura and trace magical energy are also concealed.

upgrades.name: Distance Projection
upgrades.description: Your illusion continues when you leave an area.

upgrades.name: Active Update
upgrades.description: You can project an illusion onto yourself in real-time as a disguise.

upgrades.name: Immersion Enhancement
upgrades.description: Your illusion can create sounds, smells and physical feedback akin to a 4D cinema experience.
